evals.name: default-7-days
evals.prompt: Summarize the latest software testing news
evals.expected_output: A structured markdown report covering the last 7 days with a Highlights section, all 7 category sections formatted as 2-column tables (Summary | Date), and a footer line showing 'last 7 days'.
assertions: The report header contains a date range in the format '[Month DD, YYYY] to [Month DD, YYYY]'
All 7 category headings are present: AI & LLM in Testing, Test Automation, Performance & Load Testing, Shift-Left & DevOps, Visual & Accessibility Testing, Tools & Releases, Industry News & Events
Each category section uses a markdown table with exactly 2 columns: Summary and Date
All date values in tables use the format MMM DD, YYYY (e.g. Mar 22, 2026)
A Highlights section is present with at least 1 bullet point
